  1. Applications Strategies



  1. Abstract



LaaS (Leadership as a Service) will be established through four phases:



  • Burden: Getting mankind to know that they are their own problem and that TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence) implies that no miracle should be expected for peace and harmony to reign over human society. They must know that management is the issue and the solution is LaaS (Leadership as a Service) and its SCoSH-CTP (SCoSH Chain of Transformation and Production) institutions.

  • Atlas: Mankind must be willing to play each their role in making sure no system of government other than LaaS (Leadership as a Service) is allowed to rule human society.

  • Cyrus: Reasonable individuals inside or outside governments must start the revolution needed to turn existing governmental structures into LaaS (Leadership as a Service) institutions by forming the needed alliances that smooth things over for the establishment of LaaS (Leadership as a Service) institutions.

  • Armageddon: If the universe was caused by an intelligent being, then, at the appropriate time, mankind should expect war from the person to take control of his universe, sparing only those who, at least, accept TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence) and its LaaS (Leadership as a Service) model institutions.

Note that Burden, Atlas, and Cyrus phases may overlap. Armageddon, however, is the last resort since there is clear evidence that the universe was intentionally started. By any means, LaaS (Leadership as a Service) must be established or else mankind as we know them will be replaced entirely by a generation willing to establish and uphold LaaS (Leadership as a Service), for it is the only way to life for intelligent free-willed beings.



  1. WoFeGoC—LaaS for Governments



The strategic institution in any government is the institution that maintains and protects the constitution. Those institutions, once they have grasped the reasonableness of LaaS (Leadership as a Service) must dive in and change the constitution, replacing it entirely with WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) in this comprehensive manual. WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) scales to every country on earth. Once established, it can easily expand to other countries on planet earth.

People, at the elections time, must recommend and uphold WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) by specifying that the elected candidate be willing to set WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) in motion. For that, the candidate must sign a contract to which WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) is attached, accepting to have it implemented within specific deadlines. Such a candidate must be willing to step down on failure to have it started. That is a unanimous decision since the elected candidate is responsible for choosing most of the high officials in the government.

Simply put, the constitution of every country must be replaced by WoFeGoC (World Federal Government Constitution) until all countries in the world are run as a world federal government regulated by LaaS (Leadership as a Service) institutions.



  1. Word for Religions



Let us assume a religion organized as drawn on the following diagram. Their main issue, as you can see, is “oligarchy”, which assumes that the elite class on top knows and must be absolutely followed. If help were to come to them, it would be blocked by the elite class if they decide it is not fit for their religion. How can they be used to achieve TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence) and lay foundation for LaaS establishment?



Fig.15 Oligarchy in religion



Their strength is their congregations are filled with sheep-like followers who eat their word at their mouth. They reason that they are following some God by following the elite class, which may be true. Yet, the God is defined by the elite class according to the way they understand their sacred books. However, the TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence) mathematical model is such that even the correct understanding of the book cannot be guaranteed unless the author is physically present. They, however, assume the author to be present through some so-called Holy Ghost whose existence no one can prove to anyone else.

The danger is that the oligarchic organization makes it impossible for the individual members to freely exit the system without dire consequences, especially since the elite class views itself as absolute judges. They even trespass on the family arrangement that they view as fundamental to their credo. They make the mistake of putting congregation over family, which destabilizes human society and slowly kills marriages and families.

They lord it over their members by putting too much burden on the way they should treat disfellowshipped people by socially distancing them from the other family members, even physically sometimes. They meddle too much in individuals’ private lives, assuming that they have the responsibility to keep their community decently clean. They forget that they can only see with physical eyes and that it is their God who is the Judge, according to their beliefs.

However, such an organization lends itself to the establishment of LaaS (Leadership as a Service) if the elite class gets the point. So, the following strategies can create a magnetic field that could encourage the smooth but not necessarily easy process to the establishment of LaaS (Leadership as a Service). In fact, it would encourage mutual respect and confidence through delegation, at the cost of material risk. How so?

The reality is they already survive, making ends meet on their own. They lose materially when they get proactive by applying the advice from one of the most known religious Icon who said: “If you want to be perfect, go sell your belongings and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven; and come be my follower.” They would have to sell their belongings to the individual members of their religious organization by turning those belongings into SCoSH (SCoPS, Self-Contained Personal Space, as Consumable Services-products per Shareholder or Household) through the defined SCoSH-CTP (SCoSH Chain of Transformation and Production) system that they adopt as their new way of handling religious matters.

However, if they do not have enough money and property, it would be very impractical since the authorities who oppose LaaS (Leadership as a Service) philosophy would see it as a threat and snap at their organization through restrictions, bans, legal pursuits, persecutions, etc. Hence, this approach must be viewed by any religion organized somewhat according to the above diagram as what it rightfully is, a battle formation strategy. The consequences and results are what can be expected from any warfare. So, it can be undertaken after carefully weighing the pros and cons.

The objective would be as depicted on the following diagram.



Fig.16 Oligarchy and LaaS establishment



  1. Social Associations or Corporations




The establishment of SCoSH-CTP (SCoSH Chain of Transformation and Production) through sponsorship (for the bill of materials used for invoice).


A. Work Group Equipment


1. Admin Computer and supportive software:

a. Computer

b. Operating System

c. Office software package

d. Software development platform and teamwork software

e. VPN network software and subscription on LTE network

f. Furnitured office construction.


2. Travel Provisions for any third-party crew:

a. Travel fees

b. Visas fees

b. Hosting fees


B. SCoPS (Self-Contained Personal Space) Provisions


2. Self-Contained Personal Space:

a. Energy: Solar Microgrid

b. Water: Tank, Pump, Heater, and Steel bottles

c. Agro-business: Land, crops, Poultry and/or herding,

agro-business machines if affordable or else manpower

d. Gadgets: Personal computer, cell phone, and Satellite TV set


3. Trade:

a. Shop Room

b. Cashiers that support mobile money and mobile banking

c. QR and Bar code schemes for the shop products

d. Shopkeepers

e. Means of transport


4. Banking:

a. Bank account that allows mobile banking

b. Finances Manager


C. Application Instructions


1. Call it a "Demonstration Project" for "Promoting Social Inclusion"

2. Choose N—be reasonable according to funding scheme—people

that will represent the Association in the project

3. Each of the N individuals will own a self-contained personal space

and will have to survive as a collection through trade

4. The N beings will implement some virtual means of exchange that

does not require material-based money

5. Hence, the N figure must be chosen in such a way that they

collectively be, to a reasonable degree, self-sufficient

6. Reasonably, due to limited resources in the geographic area,

local-currency funds must be put at their disposal so as to do trade with the other people in the community. They must also export some of their products and services to the outsiders to keep the local-currency funds available. The remaining members of the Association can facilitate the local-currency-based trade with the outsiders

7. Focus on tangible resources—as defined above—that can keep the

N-community alive even through financial crises like inflation

8. Include the funds needed for the Experts Crew and put it a part of

the local-currency funds.



The above can only be applied if there is the need to prove the efficiency and practicality of LaaS (Leadership as a Service) SCoSH-CTP (SCoSH Chain of Transformation and Production) and its institutions. Perhaps if the corporation is humanitarian and wants to gain confidence that the system is practical. They would then expand the LaaS (Leadership as a Service) solution to the entire organization by applying the strategy given to religions in the previous section through the “word for religions” diagram.



  1. Revision Questions



  1. What is the purpose of the book? And why has the author stuck with no other promises and guarantees than the book's purpose?

Response: The book purposes to eliminate conflicts that result from lack of respect for free will at the governance level. That has been the cause of wars, poverty, crimes, injustices, violence, deaths due to inappropriate healthcare and malnutrition. He sticks with that because any other promises and guarantees would involve a very controversy prone subject: religious beliefs.

  1. What is the story behind its initial manuscript composition?

Response: A student fired from University for acting in a way deemed contrary to respect for some country's sovereignty. The event took place on July 06, 2013 in Algeria, Africa.

  1. Cite words and sentences that can be associated with the theme of the book.

Response: Government, governance, leadership, constitution, federation, federal, philosophy, sanction, victim, sanction of the victim, Service, software, trade, order, world, world order, SaaS, Software as a Service, IaaS, Infrastructure as a Service, PaaS, Platform as a Service, institution, family, marriage, union, conflict, war, poverty, malnutrition, violence, justice, nation, country, border, human society, Islam, Christianity, Jesus Christ, Muhammad, Judaism, international borders, COVID-19, pandemic, paradise, sovereignty.

  1. Why is solving the poverty problem at the heart of universal peace and justice?

Response: Poverty is the cause of the majority of all issues and hardship that lead to conflicts and instabilities within human society. So, LaaS settles the issue for peace and justice to reign.

  1. How does the we want to live statement invalidate questions related to the origin of a creator, if there is any?

Response: As long as we have answers to how to achieve our basic desire to stay alive, knowledge about how a creator came to exist would be useless to us. No wonder mad-nomad-transpo puts any creator out of our reach in Creator Dimension, also known as Non-matter Dimension.

  1. Explain why the world federal government constitution can also be named world trade system, according to Fig.4 data flow diagram (DFD).

Response: The trade postulate has it that trade is the outermost container of all human relations. Since governance in LaaS regulates relations amongst humans at the global scale, it can be termed world trade system.

  1. Why is everything is matter postulate (EVIMP) reasonable?

Response: Well, consider three generally known basic scientific truths:

  1. Electricity is a flow of electrons. Actually, it results from a transfer of energy after an electric field is applied to an electric conductor. That transfer of energy stems from a chain of electrons that statically push one another from one pole of the conductor to the other.

  2. Albert Einstein proved that light is a flow of particles called photons. That is known as the corpuscular phenomenon.

  3. The largely used magnetic field (e.g. electrical and electromechanical machines, and waves used in wireless communication) is said to be a flow of subatomic particles named pions or π mesons.

  1. Succinctly, what are the input and output data flows to LaaS?

Response: LaaS has Shared Resources and all major human individuals as input. Its output is a service called SCoSH, that is, exploited and consumable Shared Resources.

  1. Why is the current financial system unduly sophisticated? Explain how LaaS makes it straightforward and stable?

Response: Lifelong studies were devised to teach students the internals of finances and stock markets. Yet, all people need is basic necessities which is the goal to be achieved by many enterprises involved in stock markets. LaaS makes those stock market enterprises a right to every human being due to the fact that they are fully built on top of Shared Resources. LaaS, thus, gives financial security to every human individual, eliminating such issues as budgeting stress, divorces, violence, and many trafficking crimes.

  1. Why does LaaS ignore the entertainment industry?

Response: No need to worry, since, WTSC will have space for entertainment available after the basic needs of every human being have been satisfied. Plus, LaaS derives from the status quo. More, entertainment infrastructure and tools may not pose any issues.

  1. Explain TAToE and how LaaS applies it to its institutions.

Response: Tatoe is the absolute truth of existence which says that the essence of human life is free will or free choice. LaaS applies it by leaving in the hands of a human being everything else than Shared Resources management, which must be incumbent on the collective human society.

  1. What are the two major social groups targeted by the author? What two main goals to achieve by the author?

Response: Scientific and religious communities. The main goals are: 1. The author must be followed by applying LaaS (Mad-nomad-transpo). 2. Judgment is never going to follow any religion's beliefs or teachings (Rainbow principle or Tatoe).

  1. Why have governments erred in both purpose and achievement process? How does LaaS fix that?

Response: Governments have taken on responsibilities that are naturally incumbent on parents and major human individuals, involving themselves in matters that are not their business just to enrich themselves through some coercion. LaaS fixes that when it stipulates that the only raison d'être of a government is Shared Resources and their distribution to all major human beings. LaaS turns the latter ones into AMASH.

  1. If there were superhuman intervention, what would we expect from it?

Response: Any colossal force intervention would impose LaaS onto human society, for starters. Any other miraculous intervention, before LaaS is up and running, would be a loss of time and energy. Hence, LaaS establishment can be done by mere human beings without miraculous intervention. Those responsible for its establishment must logically have priority in the ensuing benefits, whether ordinary or miraculous.

  1. Mention real life institutions that can partly or fully fulfil LaaS institutions functions.

Response: WTSC: United Nations (UN); Standardization organizations like ITU, ISO, IANA, and IEEE. HDN: Population Services International (PSI), UNICEF, and International Organization for Migrations (IOM). IFaSS: UNHCR, Red Cross, and Médecins sans frontières (MSF). TraProSeC: World Food Programme (WFP).

  1. How about crimes that violate Tatoe, that is, free will violation?

Response: Free will violation is:

{

  1. Impose behavior (IB): Any form of coercion into doing something that is in accordance with DH or PRI;

  2. Directly Harm (DH): Physically harm by direct access. It excludes any non-physical harm like psychological, emotional, or affectional harm that does not involve physical access;

  3. Contract, SCoPS or Property right infringement (PRI).

}

Each household must be furnished with as many accessible-from-outside rooms as the individuals comprising it reserved for imprisonment. The guilty ones will be detained in them after LaaS has judged them. The other members of the household will take care of them in there. If no one is available, LaaS will have a special task force available to handle their needs while in their household cells.

  1. Glossary of Keywords



Shared Resources (Shadres): All resources accessible to humankind whose existence or creation cannot be credited to any human individual.

Non-shareable Shared Resources (NoSR): Shadres that cannot be shared amongst human population due to the fact that they are not persistent and/or equally distributed over the existence area.

Portion on Shared Resources (PoSR): An equal share on Shadres per population unit.

Supportive Resources (SuRe): All Shadres that can be managed, exploited, and used by humankind.

Portion on Supportive Resources (PoSuRe): An equal share on SuRe per population unit.

Major Human Individual (MHI): as opposed to Minor Human Individual, that is, an individual that cannot start and maintain a household.

Melchizedek: An MHI whose genealogy cannot be traced to any MHI in existence.[15]

Self-Contained Personal Space (SCoPS): A trade container that every MHI must have and own. It must contain PoSuRe or PoSR, unrestricted trade capability, and legal protection that gives the human individual full ownership of SCoPS.

TAToE: The Absolute Truth of Existence.

Household: A family living in the same house.

MHI couple: Any set of two MHI’s that own and run the same household.

Marriage Union (MU): An MHI couple that are organized to satisfy each other’s sexual, affectional, and physiological needs.

MHI Switch (MHIS): A legal affair in which either biological parent of a child accepts to ransom the child by ceasing to exist to yield their SCoPS to the child when the child becomes an MHI.

Chain of Transformation and Production (CTP): The entire process through which a resource passes so as to be consumed by an MHI. [4]





Fig.17 Chain of Transformation and Production in LaaS



SCoSH-CTP: The CTP that generates SCoSH up to the point where the end user, i.e., MHI, has access to SCoSH.

Pure Democracy: A system of government in which every MHI (Major Human Individual) is sovereign. It is open to all the MHI’s since they all are shareholders.

Homocracy: Pure Democracy.

Means To The End Issue (MeTTEI): SCoPS being the absolute end, the remaining issue will be the means to achieve the end, in situations where a collection of MHI’s manage assets as shareholders, especially in CTP’s.

Purest Random Algorithm (PRAL): The most random algorithm known by humankind.

Specifications: The body of rules, principles, protocols, guidelines, and laws that are used in producing any specific effect or object [5].

Perfect or Perfection: Given accepted specifications, an effect or object is perfect or has perfection only and only if it is fully compliant with its specifications.

WoFeGoC: World Federal Government Constitution, that is, a constitution or contract that regulates oversight of human existence and relations. It can be termed World Trade System since, per TAToE (The Absolute Truth of Existence), human existence and relations fit in a virtual container that is all about trade.

TEMAC: The Eternal Marriage Act Contract.

LaaS: Leadership as a Service. A TAToE-based SCoPS-compliant system of government.

SCoSeC: SCoPS-compliant Services-products Conglomerate.

TraProSeC: Transformation and Production Services Conglomerate.

WTSC: World Trade System Constitution Consortium. E.g. UN

HDN: Human Demography and Nutrition. E.g. PSI

IFaSS: International Fair Social System. E.g. UNHCR

GNSD: Global Neutralizing System of Defense. E.g. Interpol

SRaSH: SCoPS Raw Services-products per Shareholder or Household.

SCoSH: SCoPS Consumable Services-products per Shareholder or Household.

HAQuR: Humanitarian Aid as Quick Response. E.g. OIM/IOM

FoST-HeaL: Food, Shelter, Textile, Healthcare, and Legal protection.

Public Market Place (PMP): A system of exchange that involves services, products, manpower, leadership, etc.


Global Management of Shared Resources (GMSR): Centralized global system that deals in mainly distributing PoSR/PoSuRe

to IMP’s. The Institutions in GMSR are virtual. Practically, they exist as GMSR Shops. GMSR recognizes only IMP, that is, household as the SCoPS end user and exports SCoSH to them. GMSR is subject to one constraint: World Government or World Federal Government. Due to the immutability of WoFeGoC, GMSR is an self-regulated virtual institution.


IMP: Individual or Marriage Partner; the basic trade unit of society (the Stevenson’s, Jane Doe, John Doe, etc). In other words, household.


Institution: An organization that manages or oversees the management of one or more specific resources from Shadres (e.g. Water Distribution Company, Raw Materials Trade Corporation, etc).


Shop: A private trade unit held by an IMP or a collection of IMP’s

(e.g. Telecom Companies, Social Media Companies, Industries, Corporations, etc).


Trade Interface A: The interface is virtual. It is concretized as a Chain of Transformation and Production (CTP), which is a conglomerate of GMSR Shops.


Trade Interface B: Exporting or Importing services, products, manpower. It implements TAToE.


Trade Interface C: Exporting services to the GMSR. Implementing GMSR institutions as GMSR Shops. Hence, it is virtual and is drawn for clarity.

Clean Philosophy (C-PHI or CΦ): Any TAToE-based philosophy. It has to be entirely and in all directions in accordance with TAToE.

Clean Philosopher (C-PHER, C-Alpha, or Cα): C-PHI teacher or author.

Task-Duration-based Time Unit (TDTU): The sole factor involved in pricing services rendered by any MHI. It is calculated, not in consideration of the task or the executive, but, rather, according to time unit within observed fixed deadlines.

Enterprise Executive Or Agent (EEOA): The MHI that accomplishes an enterprise or is a part of the executive personnel.

Enterprise Owner Or Founder (EOOF): The MHI from whom the enterprise specifications originate, as opposed to EEOA.
